====''Pokémon the Series''====
{{main|Serena (anime)}}
Serena is a {{ashfr|traveling companion}} of [[Ash Ketchum]] in ''[[Pokémon the Series: XY]]''. She first joined up with him in ''[[XY005|A Blustery Santalune Gym Battle!]]'' and officially joined him on his {{pkmn|journey}} by ''[[XY007|Giving Chase at the Rhyhorn Race!]]''. She is a [[Pokémon Performer]] who met Ash at {{an|Professor Oak}}'s Pokémon Summer Camp when they were younger. She had a haircut and a new outfit as of ''[[XY060|A Showcase Debut!]]''. 

In ''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]'', she was revealed to have become a successful [[Pokémon Coordinator]] in [[Hoenn]].
